title: Vynock (disambiguation)
content:
The term '''vynock''' could refer to several things:

*'''[[Vynock/Legends|Vynock]]''', a dragon-like creature native to [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]
*'''[[Vynock (mammal)]]''', a herbivorous mammal native to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*'''[[Vynock booster]]''', a starship booster system produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Industries]]

{{Disambig}}
